NUMEROUS TREES KNOCKED DOWN IN MICROBURST FROM BROADWAY TO APPLE STREET, ESPECIALLY NEAR TIMBERLINE HIGH SCHOOL. FENCES KNOCKED DOWN AT TIMBERLINE HIGH SCHOOL TENNIS COURTS. BATTING CAGE WAS LIFTED OVER BASEBALL FIELD FENCE AND THROWN INTO ADJACENT PARKING LOT. ALSO REPORTS OF TREES KNOCKED DOWN ONTO SEVERAL HOUSES.
